message:
fix(ui): clamp detail pane scroll to content bounds and add Home/End keys

- Track content line count and visible height via Cell<u16> for
  immutable render-pass compatibility
- Clamp DetailScrolled and PageScrolled deltas to prevent scrolling
  past content boundaries
- Add Home/End key handling for detail pane via CursorJumped
- Close bead coding_agent_session_search-1w3zv
